result.stdout:
Description:
  SEMA CLI Tools for generate code easy.

Usage:
  SEMA [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  new    New sema fetaure or items.
  start  start project in wath mode by node maker watch tools
  run    start project in wath mode by node maker watch tools

result.stdout:
Description:
  New sema fetaure or items.

Usage:
  SEMA new [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  view       View Command for create new view.
  viewmodel  ViewModel Command for create new viewModel.
  config     Generate config file.
  module     Generate module file in client desktop win lib project.

  view       View Command for create new view.

  config     Generate config file.

Description:
  Generate module file in client desktop win lib project.

result.stdout:
Description:
  View Command for create new view.

Usage:
  SEMA new view [options]

Options:
  -n, --{name} <{name}>             Set item name.
  -vm, --{viewmodel} <{viewmodel}>  Set viewmodel flag for create viewmodel on create view.
  -m, --{menu} <{menu}>             Set path menu for generate menu code in module.
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information

  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information

Description:
  start project in wath mode by node maker watch tools

Usage:
  SEMA run [options]

Options:
  -w, --watch <watch>  Declare watch time in milisecound. [default: 5000]
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information
